constructs.name: primary-db
constructs.description: Primary Postgres database for all Marshall Fire mass-tort data.

constructs.name: primary-db
constructs.description: Local Postgres for Marshall Fire development.

constructs.name: event-bus
constructs.description: Event bus for cross-cell async Signals — EventBridge with SQS subscriber targets.

constructs.name: event-bus
constructs.description: Local RabbitMQ for the event bus in development.

variables.name: DATABASE_URL
variables.description: Postgres connection string for the Marshall primary-db.

variables.name: EVENT_BUS_URL
variables.description: RabbitMQ connection URL for local development.

variables.name: EVENT_BUS_NAME
variables.description: EventBridge custom bus name for prod signal publishing.

variables.name: EVENT_BUS_QUEUE_URL
variables.description: SQS queue URL for prod signal subscriber polling.

cells.name: ui-cell
cells.description: Marshall Fire public marketing site — Vite + React with the marketing layout.

cells.name: db-cell
cells.description: Provisions the Postgres database, application role, and permissions. Schema migrations live in api-cell (drizzle).

cells.name: event-bus-cell
cells.description: Reads Product Core DNA Signals (marshall.IntakeSubmission.Received, .Claimant.Qualified, .Claimant.Registered, .Claim.Filed) and generates the schema registry, typed publishers, routing config, and subscriber worker stubs.

cells.name: api-cell
cells.description: Reads Product API DNA and generates a dynamic Express + drizzle interpreter for all Marshall endpoints (intake, claimants, claims, evidence, firms, attorneys).

cells.name: admin-ui-cell
cells.description: Marshall Fire staff admin SPA — Vite + React with the universal layout. Renders the intake queue, claimants, claims, evidence, firms, and attorneys against the Marshall API.
